Donations are available through account 7070 in all Egyptian banks or via the Instapay app under the name "Future Scholars Grant 7070."
Create a future... make a lasting difference.

#Future_Scholars_Grant #Central_Bank_of_Egypt #Ministry_of_Higher_Education #Supporting_Excellence #Social_Responsibility #Knowledge_is_the_Basis_of_Development

هناك قاعدة بسيطة تُساعدها على إدارة أموالها بحكمة:

%30 للكماليات

خطة ذكية تمكّنك من الإنفاق والادخار والحفاظ على التحكم في ميزانيتك. هذه واحدة من العديد من النصائح التي يقدّمها لك برنامج البنك.

text:
[1/8]
Everyone quotes "from AED 5,750" for a UAE free zone company.

That number is real. It is also deeply incomplete.

Here is what you will actually spend in Year 1 as a solo founder, line by line.
html:
[5/8]
Bank accounts are free to open at most banks.

The catch: minimum deposits of AED 5,000-50,000 depending on the bank.

Wio, Mashreq Neo, RAKBANK are friendlier to new free zone companies. Tier 1 banks like Emirates NBD want to see revenue first.
